name: XTI Aerospace, Inc.
summary: PART I ITEM 1: BUSINESS Overview We are primarily an aircraft development company. We also provide real-time location systems (RTLS) for the industrial sector, which was Legacy Inpixons focus prior to the closing of the XTI Merger. Headquartered in Englewood, Colorado, the Company is developing a vertical takeoff and landing (VTOL) airplane that is designed to take off and land like a helicopter and cruise like a fixed-wing business airplane.
